tasks.title: [RED] CLI tests
tasks.description: Write tests/test_cli.py: test main() — missing --extensions-dir→exit 1, non-existent dir→exit 1 with stderr message, not-a-dir→exit 1, zero modules→exit 1, --auth-type bearer without --auth-key→exit 1 (unless JWT_SECRET set), --auth-key file path→reads file, --auth-key literal→uses directly, JWT_SECRET env fallback, --version prints version+exits 0

tasks.title: [GREEN] CLI implementation
tasks.description: Implement src/apcore_a2a/__main__.py: main(), _run_serve(args), _resolve_auth_key(auth_key). argparse with 'serve' subcommand, all flags per spec. Exit codes: 0 (clean), 1 (config error), 2 (runtime error). Key resolution: file>literal>JWT_SECRET env.

tasks.title: [REFACTOR] CLI cleanup
tasks.description: Verify all validation errors go to stderr, verify exit codes exactly (0/1/2), test --version output format, ensure coverage exclusion for __main__.py is correct in pyproject.toml
